mission.title: litellm: [Feature]: Support OpenAI frontier models (gpt-5.5 / gpt-5.4) on bedrock-mantle via the /openai/v1/responses path
mission.description: [Feature]: Support OpenAI frontier models (gpt-5.5 / gpt-5.4) on bedrock-mantle via the /openai/v1/responses path. Requested by 29+ users.

steps.title: Check current litellm deployment
steps.description:
Verify your litellm version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
helm list -n litellm 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working litellm installation.

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
### The Feature

AWS launched OpenAI frontier models (`openai.gpt-5.5`, `openai.gpt-5.4`) on the Bedrock `bedrock-mantle` endpoint on 2026-06-01.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Feature]: Support OpenAI frontier models (gpt-5.5 /…
steps.description:
I got it working with those settings:
```
      - model_name: "gpt_model_beta"
        litellm_params:
          model: "openai/openai.gpt-5.5"
          api_base: "https://bedrock-mantle.us-east-2.api.aws/openai/v1"
          drop_params: true
          additional_drop_params: ["output_config"]
  
```yaml
- model_name: "gpt_model_beta"
        litellm_params:
          model: "openai/openai.gpt-5.5"
          api_base: "https://bedrock-mantle.us-east-2.api.aws/openai/v1"
          drop_params: true
          additional_drop_params: ["output_config"]
          api_key: XXXX==

    litellm_settings:
      route_all_chat_openai_to_responses: true
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Feature]: Support OpenAI frontier models (gpt-5.5 /…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I got it working with those settings:
```
      - model_name: "gpt_model_beta"
        litellm_params:
          model: "openai/openai.gpt-5.5"
          api_base: "https://bedrock-mantle.us-east-2.api.aws/openai/v1"
          drop_params: true
          additional_drop_params: ["output_config"]
          api_key: XXXX==

    litellm_settings:
      route_all_chat_openai_to_responses:
codeSnippets:

        litellm_params:
          model: "openai/openai.gpt-5.5"
          api_base: "https://bedrock-mantle.us-east-2.api.aws/openai/v1"

          api_key: XXXX==

    litellm_settings:
      route_all_chat_openai_to_responses: true

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with litellm installed or the issue environment reproducible.
